config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmThongKeCongDoan
Nút WinForms gốc: (không)
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TRTB_M_LOCATION_GETALL, TRTB_M_LOCATION_GETALL2, TRTB_M_LOCATION_GETLIST, TR_DONDATHANG_GET3, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDATE2, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDATE3, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDONHANG, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDONHANG2, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDONHANG3, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDONHANG4, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDONHANG5, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETLIST4
